_meta.purpose: Deterministic French→English translation map for the Apr26 Xactimate price-list batch that Alfonso exported in French (TX/MN/MI markets). Apply once at edit-time to backend/pricing/all-markets.json — runtime translator is removed.
_meta.source: Each English value matches the canonical Xactimate description in the same catalog row. Price catalog is identical between languages; only the description string is localized.
_meta.rule: If a key matches a market's allItems[].description exactly, replace with the value. Prices are not touched.
